meta.title: Global Consulting Group | Translation & Consulting in Turkey
meta.description: Global Consulting Group — professional translation, residence permits, citizenship, visa and legal support in Antalya, Turkey.

hero.title: Global Consulting Group
hero.subtitle: Professional Translation and Consulting — reliable solutions for relocating and settling in Turkey.

about.label: About Us
about.title: A consulting partner trusted by clients around the world
about.paragraph1: Global Consulting Group works with clients from Latvia, Lithuania, Estonia, France, Germany, Russia, Ukraine and beyond. We support anyone planning to live, work or invest in Turkey — from document translation to full residence permit and citizenship support.
about.paragraph2: Handling paperwork in a foreign country is always stressful, carries the risk of costly mistakes, and takes time. We take all the formalities on ourselves, guaranteeing full transparency and an official result — without complicated legal jargon.
about.quote: We treat clients from every country with the same care and trust.

translation.label: Translation
translation.title: Professional translation of any complexity — into every language in the world
translation.intro: Need an accurate translation of important documents, localization of a large IT project, or an urgent translation of personal correspondence? You've come to the right place. Our team brings together qualified translators, editors and native speakers, guaranteeing flawless quality in the shortest possible time.

categories.title: Legal translation
categories.description: Contracts, agreements, incorporation documents, powers of attorney, court filings.

categories.title: Technical translation
categories.description: Equipment manuals, technical drawings, specifications, research papers.

categories.title: Medical translation
categories.description: Medical reports, test results, documentation for medicines and equipment.

categories.title: Business & marketing
categories.description: Presentations, commercial proposals, advertising materials, financial reports.

categories.title: IT & localization
categories.description: Translation and adaptation of websites, mobile apps, software and game interfaces.

categories.title: Personal documents
categories.description: Passports, diplomas, certificates — with notarization available.

whyUs.title: Any level of complexity
whyUs.description: We take on highly specialized texts full of complex terminology and perfect them.

whyUs.title: Every language in the world
whyUs.description: From the most common — English, German, Spanish — to rare and local dialects.

whyUs.title: Strict quality control
whyUs.description: Every translation goes through two-stage review: a subject-matter expert translator and a proofreading editor.

whyUs.title: Confidentiality
whyUs.description: Your personal data and trade secrets are securely protected — we strictly adhere to non-disclosure agreements (NDA).

steps.title: Request
steps.description: You send us a file or a link to your website.

steps.title: Quote
steps.description: We calculate the price and exact turnaround time — free of charge.

steps.title: Translation
steps.description: A specialist translator works on your text, accounting for every linguistic nuance.

steps.title: Proofreading
steps.description: We check terminology accuracy, style and formatting.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.description: You receive a flawless translation in the format you need.

translation.ctaText: Need a quote? Send us your text right now and we'll get back to you within 15 minutes!

services.label: Services
services.title: From residence permit to citizenship
services.subtitle: Relocation and legalization without the stress: Global Consulting takes care of everything.

checklist.text: Document translation into every language in the world
Collecting and preparing a complete document package

services.detailIntro: Handling paperwork in a foreign country is always stressful, carries the risk of costly mistakes, and takes time. The Global Consulting team shields you from bureaucracy — we take on all the formalities and guarantee full transparency at every step.

items.title: Application & renewal
items.description: Remote and in-person residence permit applications, including student and the popular digital nomad permit.

items.title: Complex cases
items.description: Professional consulting and assistance in case of a residence permit refusal.

items.title: Problem resolution
items.description: A legal way out of overstay/visa violation status.

items.title: Turnkey citizenship
items.description: Full support on the path to a new passport.

items.title: Legalization & apostille
items.description: Preparing documents from Russia for unimpeded use in Turkey.

items.title: Notarized translations
items.description: Official sworn translation of any complexity.

items.title: Business & employment
items.description: Fast processing of official work permits.

items.title: Security
items.description: Selecting reliable medical insurance for foreigners.

items.title: Legal protection
items.description: Professional support and matching you with a specialized lawyer.

items.title: Everyday matters
items.description: Consulting on education and residency registration.
